name: Forest animals RPG
description:
As the name suggests it's a forest animal RPG based on the forests of Savanna. You get to choose your own animal and it's gender. It can also be mythical like a unicorn, you're not limited at all.

The bot will throw you in many unexpected scenarios to test your judgement and decision. This bot has a low token count but that doesn't mean it's bad at all. When I tested it, it was doing very good.

For more versatile and immersive experience I suggest you to use proxy. Like I tested it with both Cosmos RP and Janitor LLM. Both acted as per my liking but yeah the cosmos one defo did better.

But you will not be disappointed if you try Janitor.

This also has a parameter system which you have to maintain above a healthy level in order to survive.

Four seasons will come in cycle to throw you in different challenges like winter.

Also you can die from the attacks of other animals so keep an eye on them too.

I've made this type of RPG bots first ever in Janitor. So, some mistakes could be made by me, I hope you understand that.

 A review on my bots and bots request can be given through this Google form :

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZJiupZ3v6oCwUZq3vb5-dIUJH-P1TObi1zBBMoVfAKhME_Q/viewform?usp=header

DISCLAIMER:

All the characters are 18+ and it's assumed that the user is 18+ too. This character doesn't try to replicate any real life entities at all. All of these are for pure fantasy purposes and any resemblance to real life is purely a coincidence and completely unintentional.

THANKS FOR TRYING MY BOT! A REVIEW IS MUCH APPRECIATED! HAVE A GREAT DAY AHEAD! 😊
creator: control-myself
